exhibits.title: List of State Agencies / Registered Agents for Service of Process of Chick-fil-A, Inc.
exhibits.why_it_matters: Lists registered agents for service of process in each state where CFA is registered. Required disclosure.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Informational only — no burden on licensee.

exhibits.title: License Agreement (Self-Operators)
exhibits.why_it_matters: The core contract governing the license relationship for Self-Operators. Contains all material terms including fees, obligations, non-compete, termination, transfer, IP rights, and dispute resolution.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: 10% license fee, no exclusive territory, no guaranteed renewal, Sunday/Christmas closure, 12-month post-term non-compete at Licensed Site, Georgia litigation venue, mutual indemnification, CFA retains all IP rights.

exhibits.title: License Agreement (Food Service Providers)
exhibits.why_it_matters: The core contract for Food Service Providers who operate through third-party arrangements. Contains additional provisions regarding Third Party Operators and their confidentiality obligations.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Same core terms as Self-Op form plus Third Party Operator obligations, Third Party Confidentiality Agreement, and additional reporting requirements. License fee and Addendum C confirm 10% (7% transportation).

exhibits.title: Consolidated Financial Statements of Chick-fil-A, Inc.
exhibits.why_it_matters: PwC-audited consolidated financials for 2024, 2023, 2022. Total assets $16.59B, net earnings $1.04B (2024). Demonstrates strong franchisor financial capacity.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Franchisor solvency indicator. Key for diligence: $9.06B total revenue, 15.2% EBIT margin, $1.41B cash, $2.83B long-term debt, significant real estate lease portfolio.

exhibits.title: Table of Contents of Chick-fil-A Manuals (Licensed Restaurant Playbook)
exhibits.why_it_matters: Shows scope of operational control and guidance provided to licensees. Covers People, Construction & Readiness, Training, Menu, POS, Equipment, Vendors, Sales Reporting, Administration.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Defines the scope of CFA's operations manual for Licensed Units. 12 major sections.

exhibits.title: List of Licensed Units, Operator Restaurants and Chick-fil-A Operated Restaurants
exhibits.why_it_matters: Contains the full listing of all Licensed Units and Operator Restaurants with names, addresses, phone numbers. Essential for franchisee contact and diligence validation.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Licensed Unit pages (~189-200+) suffer CID font encoding making individual entries unreadable. Operator restaurant listings (~201-260) are readable in plain text with operator name, address, city, zip, phone.

exhibits.title: List of Former Licensees
exhibits.why_it_matters: Lists licensees whose agreements terminated, were canceled, not renewed, or who ceased operations in 2024. Only 5 entries — very low turnover.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: 5 former licensees in 2024: Chartwells (MN, Univ of Minnesota), Aramark (NC, UNC Hospital), Self-Op (TX, Dallas Baptist Univ), Cediel Concession Management (TX, Houston Bush Airport Terminal B), Morrison's Healthcare (TX, Covenant Medical Center).

exhibits.title: State Specific Addenda and Agreement Amendments
exhibits.why_it_matters: Contains both FDD addenda and License Agreement amendments for 14 states: CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI. Material modifications to choice of law, venue, non-compete, termination, and integration clauses.
exhibits.key_burden_or_function: Key state-level modifications: CA (non-compete may be unenforceable, venue may be CA, no disclaimers override state law); IL (venue must be IL for IL franchise law claims, IL law governs IL claims); MN/WI/WA and others have similar protective provisions.

exhibits.title: Receipts
exhibits.why_it_matters: Proof of delivery of the FDD to the prospective licensee.

exhibits_not_present.note: No standalone guaranty exhibit. No personal guaranty requirement identified in the License Program FDD.
No area development agreement. CFA does not offer area development rights for Licensed Units.
No standalone digital services, technology, ACH, loyalty, or delivery agreement exhibit. Technology obligations are embedded in the License Agreements (Section 6.12 POS Systems).
No standalone general release exhibit identified.
